props.title: Frequently Asked Questions about Furnace Installation in {city}

faqs.question: How much does a new furnace installation cost?
faqs.answer: Furnace installation costs typically range from $3,000 to $7,500 depending on the unit size, efficiency rating, and complexity of the installation. We provide free in-home estimates with upfront pricing.

faqs.question: How long does a furnace installation take?
faqs.answer: A standard furnace installation is usually completed in one day, typically 4-8 hours. More complex installations involving ductwork modifications may take an additional day.

faqs.question: When should I replace my furnace?
faqs.answer: Consider replacing your furnace if it's over 15-20 years old, requires frequent costly repairs, has rising energy bills, or heats your home unevenly. Newer high-efficiency models can save up to 30% on heating costs.
